Interface BoardRepository

All Superinterfaces:
org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository<Board,String>, org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<Board,String>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListCrudRepository<Board,String>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListPagingAndSortingRepository<Board,String>, org.springframework.data.repository.PagingAndSortingRepository<Board,String>, org.springframework.data.repository.query.QueryByExampleExecutor<Board>, org.springframework.data.repository.Repository<Board,String>
@Repository public interface BoardRepository extends org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<Board,String>

  • Method Details

    • findBySlugAndUserId

      @Query("SELECT b FROM Board b WHERE b.slug = :slug AND b.user.id = :userId AND b.isDeleted = false") Board findBySlugAndUserId(@Param("slug") String slug, @Param("userId") String userId)

    • findBoardById

      @Query("SELECT b FROM Board b WHERE b.id = :boardId AND b.isDeleted = false") Board findBoardById(@Param("boardId") String boardId)

    • findBoardByIdAndNotSecret

      @Query("SELECT b FROM Board b WHERE b.id = :boardId AND b.isSecret = false AND b.isDeleted = false") Board findBoardByIdAndNotSecret(@Param("boardId") String boardId)

    • findDefaultBoardByUserId

      @Query("SELECT b FROM Board b WHERE b.user.id = :userId AND b.isDefault = true AND b.isDeleted = false") Board findDefaultBoardByUserId(@Param("userId") String userId)

    • findAllByUserId

      @Query("SELECT b FROM Board b WHERE b.user.id = :userId AND b.isDeleted = false") org.springframework.data.domain.Page<Board> findAllByUserId(@Param("userId") String userId, org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable pageable)

    • findAllByUserIdAndNotSecret

      @Query("SELECT b FROM Board b WHERE b.user.id = :userId AND b.isSecret = false AND b.isDeleted = false") org.springframework.data.domain.Page<Board> findAllByUserIdAndNotSecret(@Param("userId") String userId, org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable pageable)
